models.notificationPreferences: Per-category notification channel preferences. Each category can be independently toggled across In-App, WhatsApp, Email, and SMS channels.
models.quietHours: A time window during which non-critical notifications are held. Critical alerts (active incident escalations) are always delivered.
models.appPreferences: User-configurable app behavior settings like default landing page and sidebar display options.
models.subscription: The subscriber's active subscription plan with current usage against plan limits.
models.billingHistory: Reverse-chronological record of subscription payments, upgrades, and refunds.
models.availablePlans: The subscription plans available for comparison when upgrading or changing plans.
models.paymentMethods: Saved payment methods used for subscription renewals, challan payments, and wallet top-ups.
models.teamMembers: Users who have access to this account with assigned roles controlling their permissions.
models.scheduledReports: Automated reports that are generated and delivered on a schedule.
models.generalSettings: Global app configuration like language, timezone, data retention, and security settings.

relationships: NotificationPreferences contains one entry per notification category with per-channel toggles
QuietHours applies globally across all notification categories except critical alerts
Subscription determines feature access, vehicle limits, and user limits
BillingHistory records are linked to Subscription via plan changes and renewals
AvailablePlans are shown in the plan comparison modal when the user clicks Change Plan
PaymentMethods are used in the Accounts & Billing tab to display saved payment options
TeamMembers are linked to Subscription via userLimit — the plan determines how many members are allowed
ScheduledReports are available based on Subscription features (automatedReports, personalizedReports)
